# TVMonogramContentConfiguration.TextProperties.TextTransform.lowercase

**Case**

A transform for displaying the text in all lowercase characters.

## Declaration

```swift
case lowercase
```

## Text Transforms

- **TVMonogramContentConfiguration.TextProperties.TextTransform.none**: An option with no transform.
- **TVMonogramContentConfiguration.TextProperties.TextTransform.capitalized**: A transform for displaying the text with the first character capitalized.
- **TVMonogramContentConfiguration.TextProperties.TextTransform.uppercase**: A transform for displaying the text in all uppercase characters.
